elements.title: lang::report_page_072_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT floor(kbi_d.timemodified / 86400) * 86400 as timepoint, count(distinct kbi_p.id) as posts
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       LEFT JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_discussions kbi_d ON kbi_d.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_forum_posts kbi_p ON kbi_p.userid = kbi_ra.userid AND kbi_p.discussion = kbi_d.id
WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
  AND floor(kbi_d.timemodified / 86400) > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
GROUP BY timepoint
ORDER BY timepoint ASC
